PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGUERITE HALLIGAN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED.
